Package io.github.natanimn.telebof.types.chat_and_user

Class ChatFullInfo

java.lang.Object
io.github.natanimn.telebof.types.chat_and_user.ChatFullInfo
public class ChatFullInfo extends Object
This object contains full information about a chat.

3 March 2025
